languages.text: {n}Высокий Фактотум, безмолвно созерцавший перепалку со стороны, с тревогой смотрит то на вас, то в спину удаляющемуся Себериану, затем торопливо кланяется и уходит.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Высокий Фактотум, безмолвно созерцавший перепалку со стороны, с тревогой смотрит то на вас, то в спину удаляющемуся Себериану, затем торопливо кланяется и уходит.{/n}
traits.speaker: HighFactotum

languages.text: {n}The High Factotum, who has been silently observing the altercation from the sidelines, looks anxiously from you to Seberian's retreating back, then bows hurriedly and departs.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Высокий Фактотум, безмолвно созерцавший перепалку со стороны, с тревогой смотрит то на вас, то в спину удаляющемуся Себериану, затем торопливо кланяется и уходит.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}The High Factotum, who had silently observed the altercation from the sidelines, looks anxiously from you to Seberian's retreating back, then bows hurriedly and departs.{/n}

{n}The High Factotum, who has been silently observing the altercation from the sidelines, looks anxiously from you to Seberian's retreating back, then bows hurriedly and departs.{/n}

languages.text: {n}El Sumo Factótum, que ha observado en silencio el altercado procurando mantenerse al margen, te mira con expresión nerviosa, luego ve marcharse a Seberian, y finalmente hace una reverencia y se retira apresuradamente.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The High Factotum, who has been silently observing the altercation from the sidelines, looks anxiously from you to Seberian's retreating back, then bows hurriedly and departs.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}El Sumo Factótum, que ha observado en silencio el altercado procurando mantenerse al margen, te mira con expresión nerviosa, luego ve marcharse a Seberian, y finalmente hace una reverencia y se retira apresuradamente.{/n}

languages.text: {n}一直在旁边默默看着这场争执的高阶顾问，不安地看了看你，又望了望塞贝里安远去的背影，随后匆匆行了个礼，也退下了。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The High Factotum, who has been silently observing the altercation from the sidelines, looks anxiously from you to Seberian's retreating back, then bows hurriedly and departs.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}一直在旁边默默看着这场争执的高阶顾问，不安地看了看你，又望了望塞贝里安远去的背影，随后匆匆行了个礼，也退下了。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Le regard anxieux du haut factotum, qui s'était jusque-là tenu à l'écart pour observer la conversation en silence, se pose d'abord sur vous, puis sur le dos de Seberian qui s'éloigne à grands pas, après quoi il s'incline à la hâte et file sans demander son reste.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The High Factotum, who has been silently observing the altercation from the sidelines, looks anxiously from you to Seberian's retreating back, then bows hurriedly and departs.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Le regard anxieux du haut factotum, qui s'était jusque-là tenu à l'écart pour observer la conversation en silence, se pose d'abord sur vous, puis sur le dos de Seberian qui s'éloigne à grands pas, après quoi il s'incline à la hâte et file sans demander son reste.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Tartışmayı kenardan sessizce izleyen Arşıkâhya; endişeyle Seberian'ın uzaklaşan sırtına bakıyor, ardından aceleyle eğilerek oradan ayrılıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The High Factotum, who has been silently observing the altercation from the sidelines, looks anxiously from you to Seberian's retreating back, then bows hurriedly and departs.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Tartışmayı kenardan sessizce izleyen Arşıkâhya; endişeyle Seberian'ın uzaklaşan sırtına bakıyor, ardından aceleyle eğilerek oradan ayrılıyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}喧嘩の傍観者として静かに様子を見ていた高官が、あなたとシベリアの背中を不安そうに見て、急いで頭を下げて去っていく。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The High Factotum, who has been silently observing the altercation from the sidelines, looks anxiously from you to Seberian's retreating back, then bows hurriedly and departs.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}喧嘩の傍観者として静かに様子を見ていた高官が、あなたとシベリアの背中を不安そうに見て、急いで頭を下げて去っていく。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Das Hoch-Faktotum, das die Auseinandersetzung schweigend verfolgt hat, lässt ängstlich den Blick zwischen dir und Seberian schweifen, ehe es sich hastig verneigt und geht.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The High Factotum, who has been silently observing the altercation from the sidelines, looks anxiously from you to Seberian's retreating back, then bows hurriedly and departs.{/n}
